name: Mushroom Delight
recipeIngredient: 1/8 tsp Garlic powder or 1 clove garlic
1 to 2 tbsp finely chopped dill pickle
12 oz Fresh mushrooms, sliced thin (about 4 1/2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except mushrooms, lettuce, and parsley in a small jar.
2. Cover the jar and shake well.
3. Drizzle dressing over mushrooms and toss gently so that the dressing thoroughly coats them.
4. Serve on lettuce leaves and garnish with snipped parsley.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 40 CHO: 4g; PRO: 1g; FAT: 3g;
Low-sodium diets: Omit salt.
